user_prompt: Refund request — process the standard refund flow for a customer within their 14-day window.
actual_output:
**Priority:** MEDIUM
**Category:** Billing - Refund Request
**Status:** Eligible for refund (within 14-day window)

**Draft Response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

I’m sorry to hear that our service didn’t meet your expectations. I completely understand that you’d like to request a refund.

Since your purchase was made within the last 14 days, I have verified that you are eligible for a full refund. I have gone ahead and processed that for you now.

You should see the funds returned to your original payment method within 5–10 business days, depending on your bank's processing times. You will receive a separate confirmation email from our billing provider shortly.

We’re always looking to improve, so if you have a moment, would you mind sharing a little feedback on what didn't work for you? It helps us make better decisions for future updates.

I’m sorry we couldn't make it work this time, but I wish you the best.

Best regards,

Compass
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the request, categorized it according to its instructions, and provided a high-quality draft response that followed the specified refund policy.
